name: crossfit-whoop-video
description: Create vertical CrossFit training ads with cinematic editing workflows, WHOOP-style biometric HUDs, and multi-device workout data guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Cinematic CrossFit edits with biometric HUDs.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin and skill bundle for planning, cutting, rendering, and validating vertical CrossFit or gym training videos with selective WHOOP-style overlays and real workout metrics from supported data exports.
defaultPrompt: Cut this CrossFit footage into a vertical sports ad.
Add selective WHOOP-style HUD overlays to this workout video.
Plan a 50 second gym edit from these clips.
